narrative:
Brook Park City has 12,202 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.4 percentage points.
